message:
bd-251t: cfg-gate container_supervision module for macOS compilation

The container_supervision module imports from Linux-only cgroup and
container modules but was not itself cfg-gated, causing compilation
failures on macOS. Gate the module declaration, its re-exports from
supervision/mod.rs, the ContainerSupervisionResult import and
plan_action_from_container_supervision function in action/supervisor.rs,
and the corresponding export in action/mod.rs.

This completes Issue 3 from bd-251t. Issues 1 and 2 were fixed in
94e7a77.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
